name: security-posture is local-only and never uploads (privacy-by-default)
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","remediation_status":"fixed","source":"cisa-kev","disclosed_at":"2026-01-01T00:00:00Z","remediated_at":"2026-01-03T00:00:00Z"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","remediation_status":"open","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/security-posture.sh" --findings f.json --deps 500 --json 2>e.txt >o.json; grep -q 'local_only=true' e.txt && node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("o.json","utf8"));process.exit(j.local_only===true&&j.upload===false?0:1)' && echo q13-local-only 1>&2
